subcodes.first_line: O thou who art advancing toward God! Verily, I read thy long letter, which showed thine abundant joy for the appearance of the Kingdom of God
subcodes.subjects: @reincarnation, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @firmness in the Covenant, @Baha'u'llah
